title: Two of Vans’ Most Iconic Sneakers Get a Mix of Motifs on Undercover’s Latest Limited-edition Collaboration
summary: Vans has collaborated with Japanese label Undercover to release a limited-edition OTW collection featuring the Classic Slip-On 98 and two colorways of the Sk8-Hi with mixed motifs.

title: Nike picks Denton to succeed Friend as CFO
summary: Nike announced David Denton will succeed Matthew Friend as Executive Vice President and CFO, effective August.

title: Nike Names Pfizer’s Denton as Next CFO
summary: Nike has appointed David Denton, formerly of Pfizer, as its next CFO effective August 17, as the company works to execute its ongoing turnaround strategy.

title: Nike’s ‘Patent Denim’ Air Force 1 Is Bewildering Exercise in Texture
summary: Nike has released an unusual Air Force 1 Low combining patent leather and denim textures, with WWD describing it as a bewildering but distinctive design choice.

title: Wavy Lines Wrap The Nike Air Liquid Max “Black Metallic”
summary: Nike is expanding its Air Liquid Max line with a new 'Black Metallic' colorway featuring wavy lines, following previous releases including a Fragment Design collaboration and a 'Green Apple' colorway.

title: 71 Funny Design Fails That Nobody Thought All The Way Through
summary: A humorous listicle showcasing 71 examples of unintentional design fails where poor planning resulted in unintended and often amusing visual or textual interpretations.

title: NIKE, Inc. Announces Planned CFO Transition
summary: Nike announced that David M. Denton will join the company as Executive Vice President and CFO on August 17, replacing Matthew Friend who is stepping down.

title: The Prime Day Sneaker Deals Editors Are Shopping—Up to 40% Off Nike, Veja, ASICS & More
summary: Cosmopolitan editors highlight Prime Day 2026 sneaker deals offering up to 40% off popular brands including Nike, Veja, ASICS, and Adidas through June 27.

title: First Look At The Air Jordan “Black Pack”
summary: Air Jordan is debuting a 'Black Pack' featuring four all-black retro styles previewed during Paris Fashion Week.

title: Nike Turned The Total 90 III Into A Literal Soccer Shoe
summary: Nike has reimagined the Total 90 III as a literal soccer shoe, timed to capitalize on World Cup match day fashion.
